burden.dalyPerCapita: low; risk of AF and bone loss in older adults

epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Low TSH with normal free T4/T3; repeat testing and evaluate etiology

publicHealthSystem.screeningCoverage: no routine screening; detected via TSH testing
publicHealthSystem.estimatedPatients: Hundreds of thousands to low millions
publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with monitoring and dose adjustment

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: TSH testing widely available; imaging in referral centers
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Observation or treatment in high-risk (older, AF risk); adjust thyroid hormone dose; consider radioiodine for nodular disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Overtreatment and limited access to radioiodine in some regions
regionalSpecificities.strongPoints: Clear management guidelines and access to monitoring
